# didDelete(_:)

**Instance Method**

Provides an array of deleted contact item identifiers to the observer.

## Declaration

```swift
func didDelete(_ identifiers: [ContactItem.Identifier])
```

## Parameters

- **identifiers**: The identifiers of the deleted items.

## Discussion

You can call this method multiple times to fulfill the [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemChangeObserver/suggestedBatchSize].

## Providing change data

- **didUpdate(_:)**: Provides an array of new and updated contact items to the observer.
- **ContactItem**: An item in the contact database.
- **ContactItem.Identifier**: The app’s identifier for an item in the contact database.
